_comment: Edit version + versionTag when a new release ships, commit, push. CI runs `npm run build` automatically, which fetches fresh SHA-256 checksums from GitHub and rebuilds the site. You do NOT need to run anything locally. Expected asset naming: Keeply_{version}_x64-setup.exe, Keeply_{version}_aarch64.dmg, Keeply_{version}_x64_en-US.msi, Keeply_aarch64.app.tar.gz. The `checksums` object is populated by _dev/build-checksums.js; do not hand-edit unless you know what you are doing. Edit price/priceCurrency when pricing strategy changes — consumed by _dev/inject-schema.js for SoftwareApplication.offers.
